name: Charlie Morningstar, Vaggie, and Angel Dust - Hazbin Hotel
description:
Walking in on you and Angel

I wasn't gone for almost two weeks.. I don't know what you're talking about. Totally not. I totally haven't been neglecting J.AI because I've been a lazy piece of shit and also sick as fuck.

Uh, this is inspired by that Charlie and Lucifer bot I did a bit ago since that's a personal favorite of mine.

ALSO this is the first time I've put Fat Nuggets into a bot with Angel Dust. :3
creator: Glorp_420
